title: Silence Turkish Dubbed
description: A texture pack that enhances the horror atmosphere by adding Turkish dubbing to Silent mode.
body:
Turkish Dubbed is a special texture pack created to transform the Silence mod into a fully Turkish experience. While preserving the mod’s deep and unsettling atmosphere, this pack adds Turkish voice acting to cassette recordings, visuals, and creature sounds, offering a new layer of immersion for players who want to experience the story in their own language.

Each cassette features original Turkish dubbing that maintains the tension and mystery of the mod, providing a natural and emotional narrative. Visual adjustments are kept faithful to the mod’s dark tone, redesigned only to match the dubbing. As a result, playing Silence feels like stepping into a genuine horror production made entirely in Turkish.

Every voice line has been carefully crafted by our team to enhance the eerie and immersive atmosphere. If you want to dive into the haunting world of Silence with full Turkish voice acting, Silence Turkish Dubbed is the perfect choice.
